name: regression-hub-project-scope-paths
description: Verify hub path helpers default to project-scoped storage and do not create root ~/.kollab/hub in the default path.

steps.command:
tmp=$(mktemp -d); unset KOLLAB_HUB_PROJECT_SCOPED; HOME="$tmp" KOLLAB_PROJECT_ROOT="$PWD" "$PWD/.venv/bin/python" - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from plugins.hub.project_scope import is_project_scoped
from plugins.hub.presence import get_hub_dir
from plugins.hub.vault import get_global_vaults_dir
print('project_scoped', is_project_scoped())
hub_dir = get_hub_dir()
print('hub_dir', hub_dir)
shared_dir = get_global_vaults_dir()
print('shared_dir', shared_dir)
print('root_hub_exists', (Path.home() / '.kollab' / 'hub').exists())
PY
rm -rf "$tmp"
steps.description: Resolve hub paths with isolated HOME
Hub dir is under project data
Shared vault defaults under project hub
Default path does not create root ~/.kollab/hub
